property.label: Quote Id
property.name: offerId
property.description: Record Id of the parent quote of the checklist items that needs to be shown

property.label: File Column Count
property.name: fileColumnCount
property.description: Columns count for the filesshown by the checklist

property.label: View Type
property.name: viewType
property.description: Object page where the component is shown

property.label: Prioritize Other?
property.name: prioritizeOther
property.description: Other section should be shown at the top
